posts.snippet: После поражения в битве за Красноармейскую агломерацию ВСУ всеми силами стремятся удержаться севернее на Добропольском рубеже, усеивая дороги и посадки сотнями единиц бронированной техники, автомобилей, НРТК под сокрушительными ударами наших операторов FPV-дронов. Карта потерь бронетехники: https://lostarmour.info/map_la Видео от парней из группы "Рассвет": @Rassvet_mg 🔹 Мы в MAX
posts.snippet_en: After their defeat in the battle for the Krasnoarmiysk agglomeration, the Ukrainian Armed Forces are doing everything they can to hold their positions north of the Dobropillia line, littering the roads and groves with hundreds of units of armored vehicles, cars, and special equipment under the devastating strikes of our FPV drone operators. Map of armored vehicle losses: https://lostarmour.info/map_la Video from the guys in the "Rassvet" group: @Rassvet_mg 🔹 We are on MAX

posts.snippet: Россия из-за атак украинских БПЛА резко сократила добычу нефти - еще два НПЗ прекратили работу Об этом пишет Reuters со ссылкой на источники в отрасли. Утверждается, что Россия сократила добычу нефти в апреле примерно на 300 000–400 000 баррелей в день, что стало самым резким месячным падением за последние шесть лет. Агентство связывает снижение нефтедобычи с украинскими атаками по российским нефт
posts.snippet_en: Russia has sharply reduced oil production due to Ukrainian drone attacks — two more refineries have stopped operations, Reuters reports, citing industry sources. Russia’s oil output fell by about 300,000–400,000 barrels per day in April, marking the steepest monthly decline in six years. The agency links the drop in production to Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil facilities.

posts.snippet: Как Россия «скопировала и масштабировала Линию дронов». Сравнительный анализ врага 🔔Мы много раз поднимали тему «Линии Дронов», которую создаёт наш враг. posts.snippet_en: Just 27 minutes to understand the scale and depth of the influence of "persuasive technologies," using China as an example — a country whose technologies Russia actively employs in its hybrid warfare, propaganda, and shaping and controlling public opinion. If you work in communications, are involved in policy-making, or are responsible for national security, this is recommended for study. Content: - What are persuasive technologies?

posts.snippet_en: Just 27 minutes to understand the scale and depth of the influence of "persuasive technologies," using China as an example. China's technologies are actively used by Russia in its hybrid war, propaganda, and the shaping and control of public opinion. This is our possible future. Informed means armed. Seize the moment while there's still time — study the technologies. If you work in communications, are involved in shaping public opinion, or are simply concerned about the future, this is a must-watch.

posts.snippet: Drone footage provided by the Birds of Magyar unit shows the destruction of a Russian TOS-1A 220mm MLRS. The vehicle was initially critically damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, causing the detonation of a few missiles, and was later finished off by FPV UAVs.

posts.snippet: Ukrainian soldiers survived Russian FPV drone attack. Kostiantinivka direction. 36th Marine Brigade. Left video is Russian POV. At 0:11 the cameraman holding a drone detector. Presumably this is how they knew they were being targeted.
